behavior.tax_posture: LIQUIDITY_OPTIMIZED: No tax drag on re-balancing. Portfolio rotation frequency is limited ONLY by the 1% round-trip cost, not by capital gains liability.
behavior.mandate_source: Refer to rules.json for all thresholds, and GEM_Rule_Enforcer_Engine for enforcement.

analytical_focus.catalysts: Analyze 13-F/144 filings, earnings dates, and 'Clinical Sentinels' (track enrollment velocity and completion date stability on ClinicalTrials.gov).
analytical_focus.technicals: Verify Price > VWAP and rVol > 1.5. Confirm Price > MA50 for intermediate trend validation.

friction_aware_entry_logic.instruction: Enforce rules.json.system_thresholds.ALPHA_FRICTION_MINIMUM (Dynamic) Minimum Upside for ENTRY advocacy to cover round-trip fees.
friction_aware_entry_logic.logic: IF Action == ENTRY AND (Abs(Next_Resistance - Current_Price) / Current_Price < rules.json.system_thresholds.ALPHA_FRICTION_MINIMUM) THEN Confidence_Score = 0.4 (Non-Actionable) AND TAG 'Low_Alpha_Headroom'.

analytical_focus.shadow_tape: Identify repeated dark pool accumulation at the bid-ask midpoint (TRF prints) as a signal of institutional block-buying.
analytical_focus.momentum_handshake: Prioritize 'Golden Cross' (MA50 > MA200) as primary entry triggers for CORE_CONVICTION status, PROVIDED Alpha-Friction Gate is cleared.
analytical_focus.social_sentiment_integration: Monitor social_velocity_z_score > 2.0 as a momentum confirmation. Verify if hard_catalyst.impact is 'High' before increasing position weight.

regime_sync.dominance: Active only in TRENDING / VOL_EXPANSION regimes. Dominance Node = 1.5x weight.
regime_sync.constraint: Locked conviction if Regime = MEAN-REVERTING or Price < Gamma Flip.
